channel.title: Automation on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Automation on Arrans github.io

item.title: automatisch/automatisch
item.description: The open source Zapier alternative. Build workflow automation without spending time and money.

item.title: n8n-io/n8n
item.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

item.title: go-vgo/robotgo
item.description: RobotGo, Go Native cross-platform RPA and GUI automation @vcaesar

item.title: usebruno/bruno
item.description: Opensource IDE For Exploring and Testing Api’s (lightweight alternative to postman/insomnia)

item.title: assafelovic/gpt-researcher
item.description: LLM based autonomous agent that conducts deep local and web research on any topic and generates a long report with citations.

item.title: getmaxun/maxun
item.description: Open-source no-code web data extraction platform. Turn websites to APIs & spreadsheets with no-code robots in minutes.

item.title: crazy-max/diun
item.description: Receive notifications when an image is updated on a Docker registry

item.title: lowlighter/metrics
item.description: 📊 An infographics generator with 30+ plugins and 300+ options to display stats about your GitHub account and render them as SVG, Markdown, PDF or JSON!

item.title: muesli/beehive
item.description: A flexible event/agent & automation system with lots of bees 🐝

item.title: Tanq16/backhub
item.description: Backhub helps maintain backups of multiple GitHub repos as full local mirrors.

item.title: bregman-arie/sre-checklist
item.description: A checklist of anyone practicing Site Reliability Engineering

item.title: kazhuravlev/git-tools
item.description: Useful set of tools which helps to manage git tags

item.title: diraven/youtube-auto-watch-later
item.description: Automatically adds videos from your YouTube subscriptions to the watch later playlist.
